channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: No tax charges filed in SPLC probe after IRS lawyers found informant program lawful
item.description: Federal agents from the FBI and IRS investigated the SPLC's paid informant program starting during Trump's first term.

item.title: Watch: How the wine industry is adapting to climate change with new approaches
item.description: Human-driven climate change is prompting the wine industry to alter its practices.

item.title: Special education funds continue to go to for-profit residential centers despite oversight
Trump says he is currently in talks to decide on Iran deal
item.description: President Trump stated on Friday that Iran must commit to never obtaining nuclear weapons and to reopening the Strait of Hormuz without tolls.
